prompt.text: Compress this campus pitch video for WhatsApp under 25 MB, keep it sharp if possible, and extract captions.

attachments.name: raincloud-campus-pitch.mov
attachments.summary: 92-second 1080p phone-recorded pitch clip with speech, room noise, and a whiteboard segment.

clarifyingQuestions.question: Do you want captions burned into the video, a separate SRT file, or both?
clarifyingQuestions.answer: Both. Burn in compact captions and include the SRT.
clarifyingQuestions.reason: Caption style changes output artifacts and processing steps.

approvedPlan.clarifiedGoal: Create a WhatsApp-friendly MP4 under 25 MB with burned-in captions and a separate SRT file.
inputs: Caption output: burned-in captions plus SRT
permissions: Write processed video, SRT, and processing report
Run local media tooling inside worker
steps: Probe the video for duration, dimensions, audio tracks, and bitrate.
Transcribe speech and generate caption timings.
Encode an MP4 using H.264 video and AAC audio with a bitrate target under 25 MB.
Burn compact captions into the video while preserving the whiteboard area.
Export the SRT sidecar and a processing report.
Upload artifacts and notify the user.
assumptions: The video duration is below the MVP cap.
Some bitrate reduction is acceptable to meet the target file size.
English speech recognition is appropriate for the captions.
risks: Noisy room audio may produce caption errors.
Fast camera movement may need more compression and reduce sharpness.

milestones.message: Generated caption timings from the audio track.
Encoded compressed MP4 with burned-in captions.

result.summary: Compressed the 184 MB source video into a 23.4 MB MP4 with burned-in captions and an SRT sidecar.
followUpSuggestions: Run a square crop pass if this will be posted to Instagram.
